arguments.expression: console.log('=== Error Stack Test ==='); console.log('Error.captureStackTrace:', typeof Error.captureStackTrace); try { var err = new Error('test'); console.log('Error.stack:', typeof err.stack); console.log('Stack value:', err.stack); } catch(e) { console.log('Error test failed:', e.message); } try { var obj = {}; Error.captureStackTrace(obj); console.log('captureStackTrace result:', typeof obj.stack); } catch(e) { console.log('captureStackTrace failed:', e.message); } 'Complete'
